description: Manage beehiiv publications, subscribers, segments, posts, automations, and newsletter analytics from the terminal.

novel_features.name: Growth Summary
novel_features.description: Summarize publication, subscriber, post, referral, and custom-field health in one read-only response.

novel_features.name: Subscriber Sources
novel_features.description: Group subscribers by UTM, channel, and referring-site fields to see where audience growth is coming from.

novel_features.name: Post Performance
novel_features.description: List recent posts with status, audience, publish timing, and any available expanded stats.

novel_features.name: Field Coverage
novel_features.description: Inspect custom-field definitions alongside subscriber sample size for enrichment planning.

novel_features.name: Referral Health
novel_features.description: Summarize referral-program configuration and subscriber referral-code coverage.

novel_features.name: Subscriber Lookup
novel_features.description: Find one subscriber by email or subscription ID and return a compact subscriber record.
